name: zag
message: worked with keii for 8 months, from jan-jun and asked for updates during aug and oct. he's pretty chill and easy to talk to.

name: Bo
message: Amazing guy, always really nice and gives the work needed without any issues. 5/5 stars!

name: Ei
message: I’ve done a lot of projects with him he’s always been very reliable and fast. His work is very high quality and has great communication with his clients. Definitely recommend, he’s a chill guy fr and he knows what he’s doing

name: ossifi
message: Super fast service and understanding of the task! He exceeded my expectation genuinely

name: verycooltiger
message: Keii was extremely helpful in creating our game. Always replied fast and showed dedication toward everything we needed. He's super reliable and if you're considering hiring someone, I'd recommend him.
